title: Drawception BEAST MODE
wikitext:
[]: Drawception, BEAST MODE.             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Thu Dec 12, 2013 9:42 am So there's this game called Drawception ... it's basically pictionary combined with the telephone game. It's fun stuff, especially when you throw a little bit of Eva into the mix. Thus this thread was born! So without further ado, here's some of the games I've played (I'm Yaywalter obviously): Game #1 Game #2 Game #3 Game #4 Game #5 Game #6 Game #7 Game #8 Game #9 Game #10 Game #11 Now go forth, minions, and evangelize Drawception! Or not, I probably did enough.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Thu Dec 12, 2013 5:26 pm Hahah some of those were pretty good. I 'specially liked number 7.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Dec 28, 2013 11:25 pm Really funny stuff! Thanks for sharing. I might do one of these at some point...

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Sun Dec 29, 2013 12:31 am "EVAs posing like Charlie's Angels" and "Abstract Bird upset with Evangelion" made my night. That's also a fine picture of Kare Kano.

[]:             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Fri Jan 03, 2014 4:21 am My latest endeavor:

[]:             Quote Post by Chainsaw Owl » Fri Jan 03, 2014 9:16 pm Those were worth many giggles. Keep it up.
